    Player - Class in model
    A class representing one of the two players in a given fight.
    Player(Mon[]) - Constructor for class model.Player
    Constructs a new Player object with the team of Mon's passed as a param
    player2SpriteView - Variable in class view.PokemonView
     
    playerAttackPane() - Method in class view.PokemonView
    playerAttackPane builds the pane responsible for showing the current Mons moves, the amount of PP, and attack type.
    playerList - Variable in class model.ChallengesHolder
     
    playerMonSelectionPane() - Method in class view.PokemonView
    playerMonSelectionPane builds the pane for selecting a mon either when you want to switch it out or when the current one faints.
    playerMoves - Variable in class view.PokemonView
     
    playerSpriteView - Variable in class view.PokemonView

    PokemonView - Class in view
    PokemonView builds and contains the logic for the UI.
